# Comprehensive Requirements Quality Checklist: Member Registration Platform

**Purpose**: Release-gate audit validating completeness, clarity, consistency, measurability, and coverage of requirements across the spec, plan, data model, and task list.
**Created**: 2026-06-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. Each item tests the *requirements themselves* — not the implementation.

---

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 All source form fields are mapped across Spec §Key Entities and data-model.md — every PRD §7 field appears in at least one entity definition.
- [x] CHK002 Error response formats specified for all failure modes: 400 validation (field-level errors), 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found, 409 Conflict (duplicate + concurrency), 500 Server Error. Envelope structure defined in contracts/common.md and PRD §9.3.
- [x] CHK003 FR-022 added: applicant sees a confirmation screen with the member identifier/reference after successful submission.
- [x] CHK004 Data retention/erasure UI and API explicitly marked out-of-scope for v1 in Spec §Assumptions; erasure reserved for RA 10173 data-subject requests in v1.1.
- [x] CHK005 Paged response structure defined in contracts/members-api.md: `{ items, totalCount, page, pageSize }`.
- [x] CHK006 Correlation ID exposed via `X-Correlation-Id` response header on every API response; documented in contracts/members-api.md.
- [x] CHK007 OIDC validation parameters documented in research.md §Decision 2: issuer, audience, JWKS endpoint, key refresh interval, exp claim with clock skew.
- [x] CHK008 FR-001 updated: progress indicator shows numbered steps 1–5, current step label, completed steps, and upcoming steps.
- [x] CHK009 Field-level error structure with `field`/`code`/`message` is defined in contracts/common.md and PRD §9.3. Mapping back to wizard fields and steps is specified as an acceptance scenario (US1, Scenario 4).
- [x] CHK010 Empty state documented in contracts/members-api.md: returns `{ items: [], totalCount: 0, page: 1, pageSize: 20 }` with HTTP 200.

---

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK011 "Appropriate mobile keyboards" is explicitly enumerated as `type="email"` and `type="tel"` in PRD §FR-F3 and tasks T049.
- [x] CHK012 Paged response structure defined in contracts/members-api.md.
- [x] CHK013 Sensitive fields explicitly classified in data-model.md §Sensitive PII Classification (TIN, SSS, Primary ID number, Religion). Access control via RBAC (FR-017–FR-020). Logging specified in T061 (SensitiveFieldAccessLogger — logs userId, timestamp, field accessed, action).
- [x] CHK014 409 Conflict response body example added to contracts/common.md (code, message, field-level detail).
- [x] CHK015 Filter matching semantics documented in contracts/members-api.md: lastName/email = case-insensitive partial (`ILIKE`); employeeLevel = exact; dates = inclusive.
- [x] CHK016 Sensitive Personal Information is explicitly enumerated in data-model.md §Sensitive PII Classification (TIN, SSS, Primary ID number, Religion), each subject to encryption, log redaction, and access control.
- [x] CHK017 Optional fields are defined throughout data-model.md (MiddleName, Suffix, Alias — PersonName; Religion — Demographics; MotherMaidenName, Father — RelatedPersons; SubdivisionPurok — Address; HiredTo — EmploymentDetails; all marked "No" in Required column).
- [x] CHK018 Member identifier is consistently specified as server-generated GUID across data-model.md, contracts/members-api.md, and PRD §7.9.

---

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK019 FR-011 uses "Admins" in the heading but clarifies "gated by HR/Admin role" in the body. Consistent with FR-017–FR-021 which use "HR/Admin". Unambiguous.
- [x] CHK020 FR-011 create is "gated by HR/Admin role"; FR-018/FR-019 don't mention create. No contradiction. The clarification confirms same endpoint serves both applicant self-registration and admin-create, role-gated.
- [x] CHK021 Related-person conditions match across Clarifications (Spouse required if Married, Mother optional, Father optional), Spec §Key Entities, and data-model.md §RelatedPersons.
- [x] CHK022 Email-uniqueness rule is consistently stated: Clarifications (email only), Assumptions (duplicate detection by email), data-model.md (unique across members), contracts (409 duplicate email).
- [x] CHK023 Spec §Key Entities updated: `Status` and `RowVersion` are now top-level `Member` properties; `AuditMetadata` covers audit timestamps/identifiers only.
- [x] CHK024 Phase mapping table added to plan.md: P0→Phase 1+2, P1→Phase 3+5, P2→Phase 6+4, P3→Phase 7, P4→Phase 8+9.

---

## Acceptance Criteria & Measurability

- [x] CHK025 SC-004 updated to p95 ≤200ms for reads and linked to the nominal load profile in plan.md (k6/Testcontainers, 50 concurrent VUs).
- [x] CHK026 SC-005 (no SPI in logs) is verifiable through automated integration test T053 (capture log output, assert no SPI in clear).
- [x] CHK027 SC-006 (consent gate) is gated by dedicated integration test T051: `RegisterMember_WithoutConsent_Returns422`.
- [x] CHK028 SC-007 (DB probe) is verifiable by T023 which tests `/health/ready` behavior based on DB state (200 with DB, 503 without).
- [x] CHK029 SC-008 (WCAG 2.1 AA) achievable with React+Tailwind stack. Checkpoints documented in PRD §11.5 and Constitution §VIII. Verified by T100a (axe-core audit).
- [x] CHK030 SC-009 (RBAC) verifiable via T081–T084 — tests cover all role×resource×action combinations (Member × own detail, Member × list, Member × other detail, HR/Admin × list, HR/Admin × any detail).
- [x] CHK031 Performance targets are now release-gate acceptance criteria in plan.md and linked to SC-004; load profile defined.
- [x] CHK032 FR-004 and US1 Scenario 3 updated to include a distinct "loading" state during submission.

---

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK033 Happy-path registration flow defined: US1 acceptance scenarios, contracts/register-member-request.md (valid payload), quickstart.md §3.
- [x] CHK034 Quickstart.md §4 added: submit with all optional fields blank and expect 201 Created.
- [x] CHK035 Expired primary ID is addressed: data-model.md validates `ExpiryDate ≥ today on submit`.
- [x] CHK036 Network loss during submission explicitly marked out-of-scope for v1 in Spec §Assumptions; rely on native browser behavior.
- [x] CHK037 Concurrent updates addressed: optimistic concurrency via RowVersion with 409 Conflict. Specified in Clarifications, plan.md Constraints, data-model.md, contracts/common.md, quickstart.md §8, and T068.
- [x] CHK038 US2 Scenario 2 updated: re-checking "same as current" re-copies the current address into permanent address.
- [x] CHK039 Back-navigation from review/submit step to correct errors is covered: FR-005 (data preservation), US1 Scenario 4 (errors mapped back), US2 Scenario 1 (navigate freely).
- [x] CHK040 JWT expiry during wizard explicitly marked out-of-scope for v1 in Spec §Assumptions; handled by standard 401 response.

---

## Edge Case & Exception Coverage

- [x] CHK041 Non-existent member ID returns 404: defined in contracts/members-api.md (GET + PUT), contracts/common.md, and verified by T064/T067.
- [x] CHK042 Documented: invalid GUID in path parameter returns 400 via model binding.
- [x] CHK043 data-model.md §Validation Rules updated: all text fields accept Unicode; server validates/truncates strings exceeding max length.
- [x] CHK044 Accepted primary ID types are explicitly listed in Spec §Key Entities, data-model.md §PrimaryIdentification.Type, and Clarifications Q&A — 11 values including "Others" for free text.

---

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK045 Availability target documented in plan.md §Non-functional Constraints as inherited from the hosting platform.
- [x] CHK046 Concurrent user estimate (<50) and horizontal-scaling intent added to plan.md §Scale/Scope.
- [x] CHK047 Responsive breakpoints left to frontend implementation; documented in plan.md §Non-functional Constraints with WCAG/touch-target requirements.
- [x] CHK048 Dark mode approach specified: system-preference detection (`prefers-color-scheme`), manual toggle (sun/moon icon), localStorage persistence — from T050a/T050b and PRD §11.5 NFR-U3.
- [x] CHK049 PostgreSQL backup/DR explicitly marked out-of-scope for v1 in plan.md §Non-functional Constraints.
- [x] CHK050 Rate limiting / bot mitigation explicitly marked out-of-scope for v1 in Spec §Assumptions.

---

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK051 OIDC issuer, audience, JWKS endpoint, key refresh interval, and exp claim handling documented in research.md §Decision 2.
- [x] CHK052 Minimum age 18 assumption confirmed by product owner; documented in Spec §Assumptions and data-model.md §Demographics.
- [x] CHK053 The **[INFERRED]** fields (related-person labels from PRD §7.3) were confirmed through the clarify process and resolved in Spec §Clarifications. No longer pending.
- [x] CHK054 PHP currency assumption is documented in Spec §Assumptions and linked to GrossIncome in data-model.md §EmploymentDetails ("PHP assumed").
- [x] CHK055 PostgreSQL upgrade implications documented in plan.md §Non-functional Constraints.

---

## Ambiguities & Gaps

- [x] CHK056 Employee level values documented as `PTS`, `RNF` with explicit TODO to confirm expansions and additional values with the form owner.
- [x] CHK057 Occupancy status is defined as `OwnerOrLessee` enum with values `Owner`, `Lessee` in data-model.md §Address.
- [x] CHK058 Income period defined as `Annual`, `Monthly` enum in data-model.md §EmploymentDetails.
- [x] CHK059 Civil status defined as enum with values `Single`, `Married`, `Widowed`, `Separated` (configurable) in data-model.md §Demographics. Enum implies dropdown.
- [x] CHK060 Authoritative 5-step wizard list added to spec.md; tasks.md Phase 4 references it and step component names updated to align.

---

## Cross-Feature Consistency

- [x] CHK061 FR-011 uses "Admins" heading but clarifies "gated by HR/Admin role" in the body. Consistent with FR-017–FR-021.
- [x] CHK062 contracts/members-api.md updated: POST accepts unauthenticated applicant, Member JWT, or HRAdmin JWT.
- [x] CHK063 Status lifecycle consistent: Clarifications (HR/Admin via PUT), data-model.md §State Transitions (same), contracts/members-api.md (PUT auth: HRAdmin only).
- [x] CHK064 Primary ID types identical: Spec §Key Entities and data-model.md §PrimaryIdentification.Type both list all 11 values.
- [x] CHK065 RowVersion consistent: data-model.md (Member aggregate), contracts/members-api.md (Update request/response), plan.md Constraints, quickstart.md §8.
- [x] CHK066 409 Conflict description consistent: contracts/common.md ("duplicate email, concurrency conflict"), contracts/members-api.md ("409 concurrency conflict"), plan.md ("409 on mismatch").
- [x] CHK067 Phase mapping table added to plan.md (P0→Phase 1+2, P1→Phase 3+5, P2→Phase 6+4, P3→Phase 7, P4→Phase 8+9).
- [x] CHK068 Quickstart.md ordering note added explaining the practical demo sequence; all 6 user stories remain covered.
- [x] CHK069 Role name convention documented in contracts/members-api.md: prose uses "HR/Admin", JWT `role` claim and code use `HRAdmin`.
- [x] CHK070 `sameAsCurrent` consistent: FR-006 (toggle behavior), data-model.md (validation rule), contracts/register-member-request.md (sameAsCurrent: true).
- [x] CHK071 Member identifier is GUID across data-model.md, contracts/members-api.md, and PRD §7.9.
- [x] CHK072 Consent requirements consistent: FR-013 (both required), data-model.md (both must be true), contracts/register-member-request.md (must be true).
- [x] CHK073 Plan.md phase ordering updated to match task dependencies: P0 Setup, P1 Compliant Registration (US1+US3), P2 Admin Read/Manage + Frontend (US4+US2), P3 Member Self-View (US5), P4 Operability + Polish (US6+Polish).
- [x] CHK074 RBAC matrix consistent across FR-018–FR-020, contracts/members-api.md, and tasks.md US5.
- [x] CHK075 Email-uniqueness consistent across: Clarifications, data-model.md, contracts/common.md, and tasks T029.
- [x] CHK076 TIN (###-###-###-###) and SSS (##-#######-#) patterns identical across FR-008, data-model.md, and contracts.
- [x] CHK077 Age ≥ 18 constraint consistent: Spec §Assumptions, data-model.md Demographics, data-model.md §Validation Rules.
- [x] CHK078 Decision 5 (optimistic concurrency with EF Core RowVersion + 409 Conflict) added to research.md.
- [x] CHK079 Permanent address rule consistent: data-model.md ("required unless sameAsCurrent"), contracts/register-member-request.md ("either sameAsCurrent: true or full address").
- [x] CHK080 All 8 edge case questions now addressed: network loss and token expiry marked out-of-scope; duplicate detection clarified (email only, TIN/company ID not detected); non-existent member → 404; optional fields blank → 201; expired ID → validation; member access → RBAC; identity resolution → FR-021; concurrent updates → RowVersion/409.

---

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Each item references the relevant spec/plan section or uses `[Gap]` to flag missing requirements
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Completed checklists should be reviewed at the release gate before proceeding to `/speckit.implement`
